continuity_tokens: same Japanese professional in early 30s across shots 01 to 03
same ivory or soft grey wardrobe family
Mitozz supplement bottle with matte black bottle body, black ribbed cap, visible light neck ring, centered MITOZZ front wordmark, and real front-label structure facing forward
visual_intent: editorial product reveal inside a real routine
premium calm rather than ad-like emphasis
brand_guardrails: preserve true bottle silhouette and label orientation
keep the bottle integrated into the room light
do not make the frame look like a sales ad
approved pack truth only: matte black bottle body, black ribbed cap, visible light neck ring, and real readable front-label structure
the scene must fill the entire 9:16 canvas with no white bands, blank bars, inset-card framing, floating panel behavior, or smaller image area inside the frame
use the locked bottle workflow: keep the real bottle design intact and adapt the environment around it instead of asking the model to redesign the pack
composition: bottle occupies about one-third of the frame
clean desk environment with readable negative space
Mitozz bottle with matte black bottle body, black ribbed cap, visible light neck ring, centered MITOZZ front wordmark, and real front-label structure facing forward
the hand action must feel incidental and routine, not staged product placement
extend the environment naturally to the top and bottom edges of the canvas
no blank white top or bottom padding and no letterbox-style empty zones
reference_strategy: Let the product-source control pack truth while the style anchors control restraint, glow, and whitespace.
variation_guardrails: keep the product shot quieter than a campaign hero shot
do not enlarge the bottle into a dominant ad object
preserve the same workspace and light continuity from shots 01 and 02
limit props to at most two supporting desk elements besides the bottle
reject and regenerate if bottle color changes
reject and regenerate if label becomes unreadable, simplified, or invented
reject and regenerate if the frame reads like a supplement ad instead of routine relevance
reject and regenerate if the frame looks like an inset composition inside a taller canvas
reject and regenerate if top or bottom whitespace appears as blank bars instead of real in-scene breathing room

text_overlay.font_reference: Noto Sans JP or closest available sans-serif for Japanese

notes: Shot 03 product relevance. Hard lock the real Mitozz bottle design intact via the locked bottle workflow and use the locked bottle size spec for believable scale. Full-bleed 9:16 only with real scene depth to every edge. Reject if the pack drifts, the label structure changes, or the frame slips into ad staging or padded framing.
